languages.text: {n}Даже среди клешней, резаков, катушек Движущей Силы и остального технического оснащения, вмурованная в машину тварь выглядит чужеродно. От ее тела остался лишь серо-черный остов, увенчанный черепообразной головой. Когда вы приближаетесь, в единственном глазу чужака, светящемся тусклой зеленью, пробуждается искра злого пытливого разума.{/n}

{n}Even among the pincers, cutters, and coils of the Motive Force and other technical equipment, the creature encased in the machine looks alien. All that remains of its body is a greyish-black skeleton topped by a skull-shaped head. As you approach, a spark of evil, inquisitive intelligence awakens in the alien's lone eye, which glows with a dull green light.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Даже среди клешней, резаков, катушек Движущей Силы и остального технического оснащения, вмурованная в машину тварь выглядит чужеродно. От ее тела остался лишь серо-черный остов, увенчанный черепообразной головой. Когда вы приближаетесь, в единственном глазу чужака, светящемся тусклой зеленью, пробуждается искра злого пытливого разума.{/n}

All that remains of its body is a greyish-black skeleton topped by a skull-shaped head. As you approach, a spark of evil, inquisitive intelligence awakens in the alien's lone eye, which glows with a dull green light.{/n}

languages.text: {n}即便置身于源力系统的钳臂、线圈、切割器与其他技术装置之间，这个被禁锢在机械中的生物依然显得格格不入。它的躯体几乎荡然无存，仅剩一副灰黑色的骨架，顶着一颗骷髅般的头颅。当你靠近时，那只孤零零的眼眶中闪现出一丝邪恶且探究的智慧火花，微微泛着暗绿的光芒。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Even among the pincers, cutters, and coils of the Motive Force and other technical equipment, the creature encased in the machine looks alien. All that remains of its body is a greyish-black skeleton topped by a skull-shaped head. As you approach, a spark of evil, inquisitive intelligence awakens in the alien's lone eye, which glows with a dull green light.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}即便置身于源力系统的钳臂、线圈、切割器与其他技术装置之间，这个被禁锢在机械中的生物依然显得格格不入。它的躯体几乎荡然无存，仅剩一副灰黑色的骨架，顶着一颗骷髅般的头颅。当你靠近时，那只孤零零的眼眶中闪现出一丝邪恶且探究的智慧火花，微微泛着暗绿的光芒。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Las pinzas, sierras y bobinas de la Fuerza Motriz y demás equipo técnico no son suficiente para ocultar el aspecto alienígena de la criatura dentro de la máquina. Solo queda una cabeza con forma de calavera encima de un esqueleto color negro grisáceo. Su ojo brilla con una tenue luz verde, ocultando una inteligencia perversa y curiosa por partes iguales.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Even among the pincers, cutters, and coils of the Motive Force and other technical equipment, the creature encased in the machine looks alien. All that remains of its body is a greyish-black skeleton topped by a skull-shaped head. As you approach, a spark of evil, inquisitive intelligence awakens in the alien's lone eye, which glows with a dull green light.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Las pinzas, sierras y bobinas de la Fuerza Motriz y demás equipo técnico no son suficiente para ocultar el aspecto alienígena de la criatura dentro de la máquina. Solo queda una cabeza con forma de calavera encima de un esqueleto color negro grisáceo. Su ojo brilla con una tenue luz verde, ocultando una inteligencia perversa y curiosa por partes iguales.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Même au milieu des pinces, des découpeurs et des bobines de la Force Motrice, entre autres équipements techniques, la créature de la machine détonne particulièrement. De son corps ne reste plus qu'un squelette entre le gris et le noir, surmonté d'une tête en forme de crâne. À votre approche, une étincelle d'intelligence aussi maléfique que curieuse s'embrase dans l'œil unique de l'entité.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Even among the pincers, cutters, and coils of the Motive Force and other technical equipment, the creature encased in the machine looks alien. All that remains of its body is a greyish-black skeleton topped by a skull-shaped head. As you approach, a spark of evil, inquisitive intelligence awakens in the alien's lone eye, which glows with a dull green light.{/n}

À votre approche, une étincelle d'intelligence aussi maléfique que curieuse s'embrase dans l'œil unique de l'entité.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Makinenin içine hapsedilmiş yaratık; Devinim Gücü'nün kıskaçları, kesicileri ve bobinleri ile diğer teknik ekipmanların arasında bile yabancı görünüyor. Vücudundan geriye kalan tek şey, kafatası şeklinde bir kafanın tepesindeki grimsi siyah bir iskelet. Yaklaştığında uzaylının donuk yeşil bir ışıkla parlayan tek gözünde kötücül, meraklı bir zekâ kıvılcımı uyanıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Even among the pincers, cutters, and coils of the Motive Force and other technical equipment, the creature encased in the machine looks alien. languages.text: {n}Selbst zwischen den Zangen, Messern und Spulen der Antriebskraft und anderer technischer Geräte wirkt die in der Maschine eingeschlossene Kreatur außerirdisch. Von ihrem Körper ist nur ein grau-schwarzes Skelett mit einem schädelförmigen Kopf geblieben. Als du dich näherst, erwacht eine böse, wissbegierige Intelligenz im grünlich schimmernden Auge des Außerirdischen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Even among the pincers, cutters, and coils of the Motive Force and other technical equipment, the creature encased in the machine looks alien. All that remains of its body is a greyish-black skeleton topped by a skull-shaped head. As you approach, a spark of evil, inquisitive intelligence awakens in the alien's lone eye, which glows with a dull green light.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Selbst zwischen den Zangen, Messern und Spulen der Antriebskraft und anderer technischer Geräte wirkt die in der Maschine eingeschlossene Kreatur außerirdisch. Von ihrem Körper ist nur ein grau-schwarzes Skelett mit einem schädelförmigen Kopf geblieben. Als du dich näherst, erwacht eine böse, wissbegierige Intelligenz im grünlich schimmernden Auge des Außerirdischen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}動機装置の鉗子や刃やコイルなど、技術的な装置の中に、機械に包まれたその姿は異様なものだ。その体は灰色の黒骨格に頭蓋骨のような頭部が残るのみ。近づくと、その異形の生き物の唯一の眼が鈍い緑色の光を放ち、邪悪な好奇心を持った知性を見せる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Even among the pincers, cutters, and coils of the Motive Force and other technical equipment, the creature encased in the machine looks alien. All that remains of its body is a greyish-black skeleton topped by a skull-shaped head. As you approach, a spark of evil, inquisitive intelligence awakens in the alien's lone eye, which glows with a dull green light.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 動機装置の鉗子や刃やコイルなど、技術的な装置の中に、機械に包まれたその姿は異様なものだ。その体は灰色の黒骨格に頭蓋骨のような頭部が残るのみ。近づくと、その異形の生き物の唯一の眼が鈍い緑色の光を放ち、邪悪な好奇心を持った知性を見せる。
